parts.text: {"name": "Solarex", "description": "An AI-powered platform for optimizing community solar energy sharing among residential HOAs.", "industry": "CleanTech", "target_customer": "HOA residential communities", "estimated_pricing": "10% transaction fee", "funding_stage": "Seed"}

{"name": "MediChain", "description": "A blockchain-based platform for secure patient medical record sharing across healthcare providers, enabling AI-driven diagnostics.", "industry": "HealthTech", "target_customer": "Hospitals and clinics", "estimated_pricing": "$500/month per hospital", "funding_stage": "Seed"}

{"name": "LegalAI", "description": "An AI-powered legal document automation tool for small law firms, enabling fast contract drafting, review, and compliance checking at 10x speed.", "industry": "LegalTech", "target_customer": "Small and mid-size law firms (1-50 attorneys)", "estimated_pricing": "$299/month per firm", "funding_stage": "Pre-seed"}

{"name": "AgriBotIQ", "description": "Autonomous AI-driven crop monitoring drones for smallholder farmers in emerging markets, providing real-time soil health, disease detection, and yield prediction via satellite-connected mesh.", "industry": "AgriTech", "target_customer": "Smallholder farmers in Sub-Saharan Africa and South Asia", "estimated_pricing": "$15/month subscription per farm", "funding_stage": "Seed"}

{"name": "EduTwin", "description": "A digital twin classroom platform for K-12 education, creating personalized AI tutors for every student that adapt to learning pace, style, and emotional state using computer vision.", "industry": "EdTech", "target_customer": "K-12 schools and school districts in the US", "estimated_pricing": "$25/student/year", "funding_stage": "Pre-seed"}

{"name": "SupplyFlow AI", "description": "An AI platform that predicts supply chain disruptions 90 days in advance using geopolitical signals, weather patterns, and supplier financial data, reducing inventory costs by 30%.", "industry": "Enterprise SaaS", "target_customer": "Fortune 500 manufacturing companies", "estimated_pricing": "$50,000/year enterprise license", "funding_stage": "Series A"}

{"name": "FinCoach", "description": "An AI personal finance coach that connects to bank accounts and provides real-time spending coaching, debt elimination plans, and automated micro-savings through conversational AI on WhatsApp.", "industry": "FinTech", "target_customer": "Millennials and Gen Z with $20k-$80k household income", "estimated_pricing": "$9.99/month or freemium with premium at $14.99", "funding_stage": "Seed"}

{"name": "HomeVR", "description": "A VR/AR platform for real estate agents enabling virtual property tours and AI-generated interior design previews, reducing in-person showings by 60% and accelerating sales cycles.", "industry": "PropTech", "target_customer": "Real estate agencies and property developers", "estimated_pricing": "$199/month per agent", "funding_stage": "Pre-seed"}

{"name": "CyberGuard AI", "description": "An autonomous AI cybersecurity platform for SMBs that detects, isolates, and remediates zero-day threats in real time with no security team required — SOC-as-a-Service at SMB pricing.", "industry": "CyberSecurity", "target_customer": "SMBs with 10-500 employees lacking in-house security", "estimated_pricing": "$499/month flat for up to 200 endpoints", "funding_stage": "Seed"}

{"name": "MindBridge", "description": "An AI-powered mental health companion app providing 24/7 CBT-based therapy conversations, mood tracking, crisis detection, and seamless escalation to licensed therapists when needed.", "industry": "HealthTech", "target_customer": "Adults aged 18-40 seeking mental health support", "estimated_pricing": "$29.99/month consumer or $15/employee/month B2B wellness", "funding_stage": "Seed"}
